AI/GPT Detector

ZeroGPT the most Advanced and Reliable Chat GPT, GPT5 & AI Content Detector

AI Humanizer

Refine AI text into a more natural, human-like style while keeping the original meaning intact

AI Image Detector

Detect whether an image is AI-generated or human-made in seconds using advanced analysis

Plagiarism Checker

ZeroGPT's Plagiarism Checker verifies originality by detecting duplicate content across billions of sources

AI Paraphraser

ZeroGPT's AI-powered Paraphraser helps rewrite, edit and reformulate the tone of your text

AI Grammar Check

Ensure your writing is mistake-free. Paste your text or start typing below to check grammar, spelling and punctuation errors

AI Summarizer

ZeroGPT's Text summarizer shortens any text and maintains the original context

AI Translator

The Leading Translation App with the Most accurate translations

Word Counter

Count words, characters w/o spaces and lines in real time. Check top keywords density, reading & speaking time and level

Dictionary

ZeroGPT’s smart Dictionary gives you instant definitions, synonyms, antonyms and examples

AI Email Helper

AI email generator allows you to quickly create clear, professional, and high-quality emails in any language

ZeroCHAT

Chat with AI that feels surprisingly human. Your personal AI companion by ZeroGPT

## Simple and Credible Open AI, Grok, DeepSeek, and Gemini Detector Tool for Free

Millions of Users Trust ZeroGPT, See what sets ZeroGPT apart

![Image 24: Highlight sentences detected as AI/GPT](https://www.zerogpt.com/highlighted_sentences.png)

### Highlighted Sentences

Every sentence written by AI is highlighted, with a gauge showing the percentage of AI inside the text

![Image 25: top notch AI tools](https://www.zerogpt.com/multiple_features.png)

### Multiple Features

Enjoy our Top-notch Humanizer Plagiarism Checker, Paraphraser, Summarizer, Grammar checker, Translator, Writing Assistant…

![Image 26: High accuracy ai text detection model](https://www.zerogpt.com/accurate.png)

### High Accuracy Model

Advanced and premium model, trained on all languages and multiple LLM models to provide highly accurate results

![Image 27: automatically generated pdf report](https://www.zerogpt.com/generate_report.png)

### Generated Report

Automatically generated .pdf reports for every detection, used as a proof of AI-Free plagiarism

![Image 28: High Accuracy AI Detection in all languages](https://www.zerogpt.com/language.png)

### Support All Languages

Support all the languages with the highest accuracy rate of detection

![Image 29: Batch files processing in the background](https://www.zerogpt.com/batch_file_upload.png)

### Batch Files Upload

Simply upload multiple files at once, and they will get checked automatically in the dashboard

Get premium features

![Image 30](https://www.zerogpt.com/transparent_api.png)

Unlock growth potential with our API

Our API is available for the AI Detector, Plagiarism Checker, Paraphraser, Summarizer, Grammar and Spell Checker, Chatbot & Translator

Our team has developed a user-friendly API for organizations. [Get API access](https://www.zerogpt.com/pricing#api)

![Image 31: Deep Analyze ](https://www.zerogpt.com/ai-lamp.png)

### DeepAnalyse™ Technology

**A pioneering research in the modeling of AI content detection**

 Our AI detection model includes several components that analyze text to determine its origin and if it was written by AI. We use a multi-stage methodology designed to optimize accuracy while minimizing false positives and negatives. From the macro level to the micro one, this is how DeepAnalyse™ Technology works. Our model specializes in identifying AI generated content like Chat GPT, GPT 3, GPT 4, GPT 5, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity AI, Claude, DeepSeek, LLaMa models … Finally, we employ a comprehensive deep learning methodology, trained on extensive text collections from the internet, educational datasets, and our proprietary synthetic AI datasets produced using various language models.

## Use ZeroGPT in Whatsapp and Telegram

ZeroGPT is now available on WhatsApp and Telegram. Chat With ZeroGPT: Advanced ChatBot, Detect AI, Summarize, Paraphrase, Translate and Check for Grammar Errors… all these features available inside WhatsApp and Telegram.

![Image 32](https://www.zerogpt.com/detect.jpeg)

![Image 33](https://www.zerogpt.com/paraphrase.jpeg)

![Image 34](https://www.zerogpt.com/summarize.jpeg)

### WhatsApp

Register your WhatsApp's number in the Dashboard (section "Social Settings") and start using all the features of ZeroGPT inside WhatsApp using the phone number [+1 (206) 372-5474](https://web.whatsapp.com/send?phone=12063725474)[+1 (206) 372-5474](https://wa.me/12063725474)

### Telegram

Register the telegram code inside your Dashboard (section "Social Settings") and start using all the features of ZeroGPT inside Telegram using the telegram bot [zerogpt_official_bot](https://t.me/zerogpt_official_bot)

Get Your MAX / EXPERT Subscription
